description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing libcurl4-openssl-dev, zlib1g-dev and libopenal-dev via apt. Define a single build stage with a build job that uses the rikorose/gcc-cmake:gcc-9 Docker image. In the build job execute git submodule init, git submodule update, mkdir build, cd build, cmake .. and make, then publish the resulting build/libsuperblt_loader.so as an artifact. The pipeline has no additional caches, rules, or deployment targets.
